chapter_title.en: The Saying When the Rooster Crows

text: 1393 - وَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «تَعَلَّمُوا مِنَ اَلدِّيكِ خَمْسَ خِصَالٍ مُحَافَظَتَهُ عَلَى أَوْقَاتِ اَلصَّلاَةِ وَ اَلْغَيْرَةَ وَ اَلسَّخَاءَ وَ اَلشَّجَاعَةَ وَ كَثْرَةَ اَلطَّرُوقَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1393 - Imam (as) said:
"Learn five qualities from the rooster: its adherence to the timing of prayers, its protective jealousy (for its mate), its generosity, its courage, and its frequent crowing (indicating vigilance)”.
